sglang.title: [Feature]Support ragged prefill in flashinfer mla backend
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Current flashinfer mla backend only uses MLA paged wrapper for both prefilling and decoding. This PR supports the usage of Ragged prefill wrapper during prefilling with empty cache, and adds an argument that controls this usage.

Usage
By default, ragged prefill wrapper is used in flashin

vllm.title: Use smaller embedding model when not testing model specifically
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Replaces:

intfloat/e5-mistral-7b-instruct with intfloat/multilingual-e5-small in places where the model itself is not the test subject
intfloat/multilingual-e5-large with intfloat/multilingual-e5-small for marginal time reduction

This reduction in parameters is 560M & 7B -> 118M.

vllm.title: [Hardware][Intel-Gaudi] Regional compilation support
vllm.author: Kacper-Pietkun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add support for regional compilation for HPU. It is turned on by default, but can be turned off with VLLM_REGIONAL_COMPILATION env variable. It works only for torch.compile execution mode. It significantly speeds up warmup time and slightly increases throughput.
Signed-off-by: Kacper Pietkun kacper.

vllm.title: [V1][Minor] Restore V1 compatibility with LLMEngine class
vllm.author: Ryp
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The check was added to AsyncLLMEngine but not LLMEngine.

vllm.title: Update AutoAWQ docs
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Make the changes from #6654 that were not done in #12743

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix MoeWNA16Method activation
vllm.author: jeejeelee

vllm.title: [VLM][Bugfix] Enable specifying prompt target via index
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This avoids an edge case in Molmo resulting in unexpected results instead of throwing an error when the <|endoftext|> token is not located at the start of the string.
Also fixes incorrect replacement items when a single match results in multiple replacements.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Initialize attention bias on the same device as Query/Key/Value for QwenVL Series
vllm.author: LouieYang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Similar issue as #13468 where the attention bias in vLLM's xformers backend is currently initialized on the default device, rather than the device of the Q/K/V tensors.
The #13468 workaround doesn't quite solve the problem for QwenVL series when vLLM is used in conjunction with libraries like trl fo

vllm.title: [Doc] Fix ROCm documentation
vllm.author: b8zhong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Quick fix for links pointing to deleted branches.
FIX #14029

vllm.title: Fix entrypoint tests for embedding models
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes:

Reduce --max-model-len to match new model
Update compared embedding size (new model has smaller embedding dim)
Update compared token counts (new model uses a different tokenizer)

Should fix https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/14338#01954bc1-23f7-4376-9330-118d17be22fe

vllm.title: [V1][TPU] Integrate the new ragged paged attention kernel with vLLM v1 on TPU
vllm.author: vanbasten23
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR integrates the new ragged paged attention kernel with vLLM v1 on TPU. In particular, this PR

Update torch_xla pin to the latest
Update pallas.py in v1 to use the new ragged paged attention kernel instead of the 3 separate kernels in v0.
Combine prompt and decode steps into one single step i

vllm.title: [v1] Cleanup the BlockTable in InputBatch
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This pr cleans up the BlockTable class by:

removing max_model_len which is not used in this class
removing start argument in append_row and get this value from self.num_blocks_per_row
moving block_id to the first argument of append_row and add_row.

2 & 3 are preparations of hybrid memory allocator

vllm.title: Add RELEASE.md

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add RELEASE.md doc.
cc @simon-mo @khluu @seemethere

vllm.title: [v1] Move block pool operations to a separate class
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR moves containers of KVCacheBlock in KVCacheManager, including block_pool, free_block_queue, and cached_block_hash_to_block into a new BlockPool class. It is just an API clean up, and doesn't change any behavior of the KVCacheManager.
It is a preparation of the hybrid allocator (#11382) and h

vllm.title: [core] Bump ray to 2.43
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Bump ray version to 2.43

Using ray[cgraph] as the new pip dependency. ray[adag] is still supported for backwards compatibility. Both of them refer to Ray Compiled Graph: https://docs.ray.io/en/latest/ray-core/compiled-graph/ray-compiled-graph.html
Update with small Compiled Graph API change

FIX #1

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Fix RMSNorm + quant fusion in the non-cutlass-fp8 case, rename RedundantReshapesPass to NoopEliminationPass
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the fp8 case, when cutlass_mm is not available. It contains the following fixes:

Removes the padding for fp8 torch._scaled_mm  in the torch.compile case, as branch specialization might not work correctly, and it makes fusion difficult.
Implements redundant slice and slice_scatter elim

vllm.author: b8zhong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add info about pipeline_parallel_size to docs since it was missing.
cc @strangiato: does this look clear?
FIX #12012  (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add file lock for ModelScope download
vllm.author: jeejeelee

vllm.title: [Misc][Kernel]: Add GPTQAllSpark Quantization
vllm.author: wyajieha
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR mainly added specific optimizations for the Ampere architecture A16W8 quantization, supporting the GPTQ quantization model in the scenario where GroupSize=-1 and act_desc is False, and its performance in this scenario is better than Marlin.
Operator performance test (Marlin VS AllSpark) can

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1][Minor] Fix shutting_down flag checking in V1 MultiprocExecutor
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I noticed the checking for shutting_down flag in V1 MultiprocExecutor will always be False, and it ignores _ensure_worker_termination for terminating worker processes gracefully in some situations.
This PR fixed it.

vllm.title: [Documentation] Add more deployment guide for Kubernetes deployment
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds deployment guide with Kubernetes using native Kubernetes, and using helm chart provided by vllm-project/production-stack.

vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add encoder_decoder_multimodal.py example to instruct explicit prompt usage for multimodal encoder-decoder models
Consolidate whisper and florence2 examples into audio_language.py and encoder_decoder_multimodal.py

vllm.title: [V1][Minor] Do not print attn backend twice
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: After #13789, the log (INFO 02-27 10:34:40 [cuda.py:169] Using Flash Attention backend on V1 engine.) is printed twice. This PR fixes it.

vllm.title: [ROCm][V1][Bugfix] Add get_builder_cls method to the ROCmAttentionBackend class
vllm.author: SageMoore
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The ROCmAttentionBackend currently just uses the FlashAttentionMetadata so it can use the FlashAttentionMetadataBuilder. This PR is required now that the V1 GPUModelRunner supports other meta data structures.
